label: Video
description: Transform your galleries with professional video integration. Seamlessly mix images and videos to create immersive, dynamic visual experiences.

settings.title: YouTube & Vimeo Integration
settings.description: Import videos directly from YouTube and Vimeo. Import entire channels, playlists, albums, or individual videos instantly.

settings.title: Mix Images & Videos
settings.description: Create rich, dynamic galleries that seamlessly combine images and videos in one beautiful showcase.

settings.title: Self-Hosted Video Support
settings.description: Upload and host your own videos with full control over thumbnails, quality, and playback settings.

settings.title: Multi-Platform Support
settings.description: Connect with Facebook, Dailymotion, TED Talks, and other popular video platforms - all in one place.

settings.title: Premium Video Lightbox
settings.description: Stunning video playback in a beautiful lightbox with responsive controls, autoplay options, and seamless navigation.

settings.title: Advanced Video Controls
settings.description: Custom thumbnails, auto-generated previews, quality selection, and complete styling control for your video galleries.
